hypothesis: IF we grep TODO|FIXME|HACK|XXX across {helen_os/, helen_city/, helen_os_scaffold/} and classify each hit by (a) real-action-required vs (b) benign (feature name / format placeholder / design note), THEN the net open-action count is small and each item has a documented or accepted disposition.

experiment.action: ripgrep TODO|FIXME|HACK|XXX (word-boundary and fallback substring) across three kernel directories; triage each hit.

benign: helen_os/temple/run_hackathon_epoch.py (6 hits) — 'HACKATHON' is a feature name, not a HACK marker
helen_os/proposal/proposal_packet.py:99 — 'inf_XXXXXXXXXXXX' is a format-placeholder in a docstring example

notes: conquest/road_solver.py:7 — V0_2 design deferral comment in Conquest game subtree (non-kernel, non-governance). Benign.
api/do_next.py:389 — `# TODO: Implement full audit_knowledge_state logic`. Stub returns `{findings: [], routing_consequence: annotate}` (safe defaults). Known placeholder.
api/do_next.py:611 — `receipt_chain_hash="TODO"` literal passed to emit_conclusion. Known placeholder captured by Step 4A conformance report (STEP_4A_PHASE_TRACE_REPORT_V1.md:225) as PASS.

dispositions.conquest/road_solver.py:7: KEEP — Conquest is a game subtree, not part of HELEN kernel. No constitutional bearing.
dispositions.helen_os_scaffold/helen_os/api/do_next.p: KEEP_AS_PLACEHOLDER — audit_knowledge_state returning empty findings + annotate is a safe default that preserves determinism. Implementing the full logic is a separate bounded tranche (would belong to the Knowledge Compiler V2 ratification track).

KEEP_AS_DOCUMENTED_GAP — Step 4A conformance reviewed and marked PASS. Receipt chain hash as literal "TODO" currently does not break any test; it is a field value in the CONCLUSION receipt payload and downstream consumers do not require the hash to be computed (yet). Real fix requires (a) hashing the DECISION → EXECUTION → ARTIFACT chain, (b) updating the receipt schema if strictness is added, (c) a new tranche.

close_conditions: every raw hit is either benign or has an accepted disposition
zero new findings require immediate action
reopen_conditions: a TODO comment references a failing test
a TODO literal appears in a receipt field the test suite validates strictly

failure_model.false_positive: Word-boundary grep counts feature names (HACKATHON) and format placeholders (XXXXXXXXXXXX). Mitigated by per-hit inspection.
failure_model.false_negative: French/accented variants of TODO or TODO-like sentinels in other natural languages. Low probability in an English-language codebase.
failure_model.gameable: Authors could spell TODO as T0D0 to dodge grep. Not observed and outside current threat model.
failure_model.breaks_if: A future schema validator requires receipt_chain_hash to be SHA-256 format; the do_next.py:611 literal would then break tests.

note: E17 confirms that the HELEN kernel (helen_os/, helen_city/) has zero open TODOs. The two real TODOs live in the scaffold's /do_next API implementation and are both DOCUMENTED_GAP items — one is a stubbed audit subroutine with safe defaults, the other is a placeholder field value captured by Step 4A conformance. Neither blocks current tests nor weakens any invariant. The triage rule-of-thumb: TODOs in helen_os/ core would be a constitutional issue; TODOs in helen_os_scaffold/ with Step-4A provenance are documented governance debt with known handlers.
